name: @radzor/vector-search
description: Vector embedding storage and semantic search. Supports Pinecone, Qdrant, and pgvector. Index documents with embeddings and query by semantic similarity for RAG pipelines, recommendation engines, and duplicate detection.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for Pinecone. Not required for Qdrant or pgvector.

inputs.name: host
inputs.description: Host URL for Qdrant or pgvector connection string. Not used for Pinecone.

inputs.name: indexName
inputs.description: Name of the index / collection / table to use.

inputs.name: dimensions
inputs.description: Embedding vector dimensions. Must match the embedding model (e.g. 1536 for text-embedding-3-small).

inputs.name: topK
inputs.description: Default number of results to return.

outputs.name: searchResults
outputs.description: Array of matched documents with id, score, and metadata.

outputs.name: indexStats
outputs.description: Index statistics: total vectors, dimensions, fullness.

events.name: onIndexed
events.description: Fired when a vector is successfully indexed.

events.name: onSearchComplete
events.description: Fired when a search query completes.

actions.name: index

params.name: metadata
params.description: Arbitrary metadata stored alongside the vector.

actions.description: Store a vector with its metadata.

actions.name: indexBatch

params.name: items
params.type: Array<{ id: string; vector: number[]; metadata?: Record<string, unknown> }>

actions.description: Index multiple vectors in a single request.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Find the most semantically similar vectors.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the vector to remove.

llm.constraints: Vectors must be pre-computed — this component does not generate embeddings. Use @radzor/llm-completion or the OpenAI embeddings API to generate vectors before indexing. Dimensions must be set at index creation time and cannot be changed.
